The code looks OK I ahve a few small suggestions
but as I comment on your Jira, are we sure that is this is functional the same as we had (or is as intended!) , I have some minor doubts, you probably already checked so I just need a little chat for you to convince me.
In my absence this week you probably can merge this if others are happy we can discuss next week...
